chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Cr. Acq. Appeal No. S – 106 of 2023 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Fresh case 1. For orders on office objections at Flag-A 2. For orders on MA No.6231/2023 3. For hearing of main case 19.01.2024 None present. No intimation is received. Accordingly, this appeal dismissed for non-prosecution along with listed application. J U D G E Abdul Basit
